T0115.title: Casting Bait
T0115.definition: The preparatory act of mass-distributing fake advertisements or messages to screen for potential victims.
T0115.description: Fraud rings widely disseminate bait such as 'loan limit increases' or 'vaccine appointments' through bulk SMS, social media groups, or web pop-ups. This stage does not involve direct fraud but waits for interested victims to initiate contact, effectively filtering for easy targets for the subsequent 'cashing out' stage.
T0115.usageExample: The ringleader pressed his crew in the group chat, asking, 'Did you scatter enough bait today? Why haven't any fish bitten yet?' By 'scattering bait,' he meant checking who had clicked on the phishing SMS links they sent out.
